title: Array method name failed to parse if conflict with sv keywords

features.name: queue method call with keyword-conflicting name 'and'
features.description: Code should include a queue variable with a method call using a name that conflicts with an SV keyword (such as 'and' used as a queue method)

features.name: empty parentheses on array method with keyword name
features.description: Code should include an array method call with empty parentheses where the method name is an SV keyword like 'and'
